meta.title: Bayshore Networks' CEO Kevin Senator
meta.description:
The ICS security product vendors tend to focus on a product segment, firewall, data-diode, detection, ..., Bayshore Networks is unique in that they have the closest thing to a full line of ICS security products. This is being grown further with their recent acquisition of GE's OpShield technology.

Dale Peterson talks with CEO Kevin Senator about the strategy, individual product segments, and why GE and Bayshore did this detail. 

It is admittedly a bit commercial as Kevin touts the company, products and strategy. Dale asks some tough questions, and Kevin gives some candid answers.
